title: Run the Super Kimi SOTA gate over current local artifacts
prompt: Run the local SOTA gate over existing bench-system and bounded loop artifacts while auto-selecting the latest passing live TUI, real workflow, and Ultrawork artifacts, then verify that it emits PASS JSON, Markdown evidence, and a required Super Kimi loop score without using browser UI as a success surface.

args: const fs=require('node:fs'); const summary=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('.omo/evidence/kimi-agent-bench/system-suite/sota-gate/sota-gate-summary.json','utf8')); const md=fs.readFileSync('.omo/evidence/kimi-agent-bench/system-suite/sota-gate/sota-gate-summary.md','utf8'); if (summary.status !== 'PASS') throw new Error(`SOTA gate status ${summary.status}`); for (const name of ['system-score-pass-rate','bounded-loop-best-score','frontier-benchmark-targets','live-tui-required-scenarios','real-tui-workflow-proof','live-tui-ultrawork-source-test-proof','system-budget','no-web-ui-success-surface','no-secret-like-evidence','cleanup-receipt-presence','super-kimi-loop-score','xp-dod-harness-contract','human-writing-anti-slop-contract']) { const gate=summary.gates?.find((entry)=>entry.name===name); if (gate?.status !== 'PASS') throw new Error(`missing passing gate ${name}`); } for (const name of ['real-tui-workflow-proof','live-tui-ultrawork-source-test-proof']) { const gate=summary.gates?.find((entry)=>entry.name===name); if (gate?.observed?.validationStatuses?.statusLimitedToWorkflowFiles !== 'PASS') throw new Error(`${name} does not enforce clean workflow file scope`); } for (const name of ['tuiSummary','workflowSummary','ultraworkSummary']) { if (summary.inputSelections?.[name]?.source !== 'auto-latest-pass') throw new Error(`${name} was not auto-selected from latest passing evidence`); } if (summary.loopScorecard?.status !== 'PASS' || summary.loopScorecard?.score !== 100 || summary.loopScorecard?.dimensions?.length !== 7) throw new Error('missing passing Super Kimi loop scorecard'); if (summary.frontierBenchmarkTargets?.model !== 'Claude Sonnet 5') throw new Error('missing Claude Sonnet 5 frontier targets'); if (summary.frontierBenchmarkTargets?.targets?.find((target)=>target.id==='gdpval-aa-v2')?.target !== 1609) throw new Error('GDPval-AA v2 target must use the official PDF value 1609'); for (const text of ['Super Kimi Loop Score','Definition of Done','XP-lite Harness Rules','Human Writing / Anti-Slop','Frontier Benchmark Targets','Claude Sonnet 5','SWE-bench Pro','Terminal-Bench 2.1','OSWorld-Verified','GDPval-AA v2','1609 score','surface-specific voice lane','product UX microcopy','Institutional corporate copy','style-analysis inputs only','avoid-ai-writing checks','No unrelated files changed.','No broad refactor mixed into the task.','Public behavior is covered by tests unless the change is purely cosmetic or documentation-only.']) { if (!md.includes(text)) throw new Error(`missing loop score markdown text: ${text}`); } if (!md.includes('Terminal-Bench') || !md.includes('SWE-bench') || !md.includes('OSWorld') || !md.includes('tau-bench') || !md.includes('VeRO') || !md.includes('Meta-Harness')) throw new Error('missing rubric references');
